title: Botanica [16x]
description: A green themed 1.8.9 pvp pack, themed arround nature.
body:
Botanica is a texture pack made for 1.8.9 pvp, mainly bedwars.

It is overall made arround the color green as well as the theme of nature.

It also includes a custom sky witch only works with Optifine, not to worry, if you dont use Optifine, the pack will still work just fine !

Here are some ingame screenshots to showcase more of the pack :

![Botanica #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07780d0c31470872d656367d109612e4ebf52a04_0.webp)

![Botanica #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7894f4dc9b06639258998125973d2b3da2f9a4bc.jpeg)

![Botanica #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31abd47bbfff817a1b2ed6d657ebaa04411b4b59_0.webp)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
